course.title: Learn English with Minecraft Hardcore LIVE - TNT!!
course.description: Learn English with Minecraft — Episode 34. 5 curated listening segments with cloze quizzes.

lesson.transcript_zh: 在这个关于TNT的直播中，玩家先用白色羊毛制作了旗帜，然后开始挖掘草地准备养羊。他整理了多个箱子，把泥土放在一个箱子里，圆石放在另一个箱子里。他用幸运三的镐挖了青金石矿，并用剩余的铁锭制作了更多的锅釜。整个直播展示了极限模式中的日常建设和资源管理。

segments.sentence_en: Okay. To make the flag, I'll take some white wool. Six white wool. And now I'll make a banner. B A N.
segments.sentence_zh: 好的。为了做旗帜，我会拿一些白色羊毛。六块白色羊毛做一面 __BLANK__。

segments.sentence_en: This chest I'll put dirt. In this chest I'll put cobblestone and normal stone. I'll put away my wooden stuff in this.
segments.sentence_zh: 这个 __BLANK__ 我放泥土。这个箱子我放圆石。

segments.sentence_en: This lapis and I'll mine it with my fortune three pickaxe. There we go. Lots of lapis. I'll put that in my.

segments.sentence_en: I'm going to use the rest of my iron to make more cauldrons. Let's make nine more cauldrons. Now I have 18.
